platform.architectures: Current local builds in this workspace are arm64. Official universal or Intel release support is [TBD — requires product/source confirmation].

summary: Buoy applies a reversible AC power profile through a CLI-first engine and exposes a native macOS dashboard for power, system, process, service, network, and storage inspection.

features.name: Buoy mode
features.description: Applies a server-friendly AC profile and restores the previously saved AC settings.

features.name: Closed-lid awake mode
features.description: Optionally manages SleepDisabled above a battery floor with a helper process.

features.name: Configurable display sleep
features.description: Lets the display sleep on its own timer while full idle sleep on AC stays disabled.

features.name: Native power control surface
features.description: Wraps the CLI in a native macOS app with explicit apply, restore, refresh, and display-sleep actions.

features.name: Live dashboard
features.description: Shows Overview, Power, System, Processes, Services, Network, and Storage sections.

features.name: Storage summary refresh
features.description: Loads cached or fast summary storage data without forcing a full file enumeration.

features.name: Storage deep scan
features.description: Enumerates large files and deeper targets for exact cleanup review.

features.name: Machine-readable status
features.description: Provides JSON output for status and doctor commands.

permissions.name: Protected-folder access
permissions.reason: Buoy keeps protected storage scopes opt-in.

permissions.name: Custom folder or drive access
permissions.reason: Buoy stores bookmarks for user-selected extra scan locations.

metrics.name: cpu_overall_percent
metrics.notes: Delta-based CPU usage across all cores.

metrics.name: memory_usage_percent
metrics.notes: Approximate used-memory percentage based on active + wired + compressed memory.

metrics.name: disk_usage_percent
metrics.notes: Root-mount usage using volume metadata when available.

metrics.name: battery_percent
metrics.notes: Unavailable on machines without a battery.

metrics.name: wattage_draw
metrics.notes: Approximate instantaneous power draw when exposed by AppleSmartBattery.

metrics.name: storage_reclaimable_bytes
metrics.notes: Sum of items currently classified as cleanup candidates.

limitations: Current build scripts compile native binaries for the build host instead of universal binaries.
Restore behavior depends on the Buoy state file remaining intact.
Closed-lid awake mode depends on a helper process that can drift if killed externally.
CPU temperature is intentionally unavailable in the current Apple silicon path.
Protected storage folders remain partial until explicitly granted.
The current repository does not show a notarization step for app distribution.

first_checks: Confirm the installed CLI is available

troubleshooting.symptom: buoy off cannot restore expected settings
first_checks: Confirm mode state in buoy status
Review Access Grants in the Storage section
Check for skipped protected paths in the status text
